name: CompTIA A+
description: Foundational IT program covering hardware, operating systems, networking, security, and cloud computing. Focuses on technical support and core help desk troubleshooting skills.

name: Freelance Business Foundations
description: Business-side program covering client acquisition, proposal writing, contracts, pricing strategy, and scope management. A practical toolkit for running an independent creative practice.

name: Motion Design with After Effects
description: Motion principles, keyframe animation, easing curves, and compositing applied to title sequences, UI animations, and explainer video production.

name: 3D Art for Real-Time Engines
description: Bridging offline rendering knowledge with real-time constraints — optimizing assets, baking maps, and building environments in Unreal Engine for interactive and immersive projects.

name: Creative Coding & Generative AI
description: Exploring the intersection of code, generative models, and visual art — building interactive installations, AI-assisted design tools, and procedural media for web and physical spaces.
